晴れ.mnemonics: Imagine the sun 'hares' out of the clouds, bringing 'sunny weather'.

雨.mnemonics: Think of 'ame' as rain 'amassing' in the sky before it pours down.

曇り.mnemonics: Visualize clouds 'kumori-ng' (covering) the sky, making it 'cloudy'.

雪.mnemonics: Imagine each snowflake saying 'Yuki' as it 'you-key' into locking the landscape in white.

天気予報.mnemonics: Think of 'tenkiyohou' as 'ten key' factors you 'ho(u)-ld' check to know the 'weather forecast'.

気温.mnemonics: Imagine the 'ki-on' (key-on) to control the 'temperature' of the weather.

夏.mnemonics: Think of 'natsu' as 'not-soo' cool, because it's 'summer'.

冬.mnemonics: Envision 'fu-yu' as 'few-you', with fewer warm days in 'winter'.

今朝.mnemonics: Think of 'kesa' as 'key-saw' the sunrise 'this morning'.

明後日.mnemonics: Imagine saying 'Ah! Sate!' (Ah, set!) plans for 'the day after tomorrow'.

会社員.mnemonics: Think of 'kaishain' as 'kai-sha' (company) 'in' which an 'office worker' works.

仕事.mnemonics: Envision 'shigoto' as 'she got to' go to her 'job; work; occupation'.

カメラ.mnemonics: Remember 'camera' by imagining a 'camera' capturing a turtle ('kame' in Japanese).

カラオケ.mnemonics: Think of 'karaoke' as 'car-ah-okay', where everyone sings in the car as if it's a 'karaoke' session.

所.mnemonics: Imagine 'tokoro' as 'to-call-row', a 'place' where everyone lines up to call.

トマト.mnemonics: Remember 'tomato' by picturing a 'tomato' saying 'to-ma-to', emphasizing each syllable.

箸.mnemonics: Think of 'hashi' as 'ha-she', she has 'chopsticks' in her hand.

パーティー.mnemonics: Imagine 'party' as 'pa-tea', where everyone brings tea to the 'party'.

バーベキュー.mnemonics: Envision 'barbecue' as 'bar-be-cue', where the bar is the cue to start the 'barbecue'.

english: homestay; living with a local family
ホームステイ.mnemonics: Think of 'homestay' as 'home-stay', staying at a home away from home.

お風呂.mnemonics: Imagine 'ofuro' as 'oh-furrow', relaxing in a bath that washes away the day's 'furrows'.

スペイン.mnemonics: Remember 'Spain' by thinking of 'supein' as 's-pain', the excitement of exploring Spain without the pain of travel.

何か.mnemonics: Think of 'nanika' as 'nanny-ka', something a nanny might ask about what you want to do.

上手.mnemonics: Imagine 'jouzu' as 'Joe's zoo', where Joe is skillful at managing a zoo.

下手.mnemonics: Picture 'heta' as 'he-ta(p)', clumsily trying to fix a tap but failing.

有名.mnemonics: Think of 'yuumei' as 'you-may', you may know this person because they are 'famous'.

洗う.mnemonics: Imagine 'arau' as 'a-row', lining up all the dishes to 'wash' them.

言う.mnemonics: Think of 'iu' as 'ee-woo', the sound you make when you're about to 'say' something.

要る.mnemonics: Envision 'iru' as 'I rue', regretting not having what you 'need'.

遅くなる.mnemonics: Picture 'osokunaru' as 'oh-so-ku-nar-row', rowing so slowly that you 'be late'.

お風呂に入る.mnemonics: Imagine 'ofuro ni hairu' as 'oh-furrow knee higher', stepping higher with your knee into the bath.

思う.mnemonics: Think of 'omou' as 'oh-moo', pondering deeply like a cow 'moo-ing' in thought.

切る.mnemonics: Imagine 'kiru' as 'key-rue', rueing the day you had to 'cut' with a key because no scissors were available.

作る.mnemonics: Picture 'tsukuru' as 't's-cool-rue', a cool street where everything you want to 'make' comes true.

降る.mnemonics: Imagine 'furu' as 'fur-roo', where rain or snow 'falls' like fur from the sky.

持っていく.mnemonics: Think of 'motteiku' as 'mote-eek-u', carrying something important with an 'eek' of concern.

捨てる.mnemonics: Envision 'suteru' as 'sue-terr', suing the clutter by 'throwing away' what you don't need.

始める.mnemonics: Imagine 'hajimeru' as 'hajimaru', the starting line where you 'begin' a race.

運転する.mnemonics: Think of 'unten suru' as 'un-ten-sure', being sure when you 'drive' under ten (speed limit).

洗濯する.mnemonics: Picture 'sentaku suru' as 'send-taku-sure', sending clothes to be sure they are 'laundry' cleaned.

掃除する.mnemonics: Imagine 'souji suru' as 'so-gee-sure', being sure to 'clean' so gee it sparkles.

料理する.mnemonics: Think of 'ryouri suru' as 'rye-ori-sure', being sure to 'cook' the rye or any ingredient perfectly.

うん.mnemonics: Remember 'un' as the sound of agreement, 'uh-huh', nodding your head in 'yes'.

ううん.mnemonics: Think of 'uun' as the sound of hesitation or denial, 'uh-uh', shaking your head in 'no'.

いつも.mnemonics: Imagine 'itsumo' as 'it's-mo', 'it's more' than often, it's 'always'.

遅く.mnemonics: Picture 'osoku' as 'oh-so-coo', doing things in a cool, relaxed manner, but 'late'.

乾杯.mnemonics: Envision 'kanpai' as 'can-pie', raising a can to toast before enjoying a pie, saying 'Cheers!'.

みんなで.mnemonics: Think of 'minnade' as 'minna-day', a day where 'all (of the people) together' celebrate.

残念.mnemonics: Imagine 'zannen' as 'zan-nen', feeling 'That's too bad' when plans go 'zan' (completely) wrong.

まだ.mnemonics: Think of 'mada' as 'ma-da', 'ma' (mother) saying 'da (there)'s still time', implying 'not...yet'.

について.mnemonics: Visualize 'ni tsuite' as 'knee-to-it', attaching information directly to the topic, 'about...; concerning...'.

度.mnemonics: Remember 'do' as 'dough', which rises a certain 'degree' in temperature when baking.

どう.mnemonics: Think of 'dou' as 'dough', questioning 'how' it will rise or change shape when you bake it.

員.mnemonics: Visualize 'in' as a member ('in') of a club holding an ID card.

新.mnemonics: Think of 'atarashii' as a new ('atarashii') invention ('shin') changing the world.

聞.mnemonics: Remember 'bun' as listening to a news ('bun') report on the radio.

作.mnemonics: Visualize 'tsuku' as making a 'sack' ('saku') of potatoes from scratch.

仕.mnemonics: Think of 'shi' as serving ('shi') a cup of tea ('tsuka') to a guest.

事.mnemonics: Remember 'koto' as a thing ('koto') to be done in the future.

電.mnemonics: Visualize 'den' as an electric ('den') wire sparking with electricity.

車.mnemonics: Think of 'sha' as a car ('sha') zooming past a sign that says 'kuru-ma'.

休.mnemonics: Remember 'yasumu' as taking a rest ('yasumu') under a cool breeze ('kyuu').

言.mnemonics: Visualize 'ii' as saying something ('ii') kind ('ii') to someone.

読.mnemonics: Think of 'yomu' as reading a book ('yomu') while lying on a dock ('doku').

思.mnemonics: Remember 'omoi' as thinking ('omoi') deeply ('shin') about something.

次.mnemonics: Visualize 'tsugi' as the next ('tsugi') train arriving at the station.

何.mnemonics: Think of 'nani' as asking 'what?' ('nani') in confusion ('nan').
